TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Lee_Aaker, title = Lee_Aaker, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lee_Aaker} }

S.FORM: Lee Aaker kawas tay 1943, ryax sa tay 25 nqu tay 9, Lee Aaker, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
Lee Aaker kawas tay 1943, ryax sa tay 25 nqu tay 9, Lee Aaker, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: lee aaker kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, lee aaker, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
